reviews.review_title: The best game on app lab
reviews.review_description: This game is epic. The monsters are cool and I love stabbing monsters with ice cream. This game is so much fun

reviews.review_title: Great concept but just a few bugs
reviews.review_description: I only played this for 20 minutes and it was overall fun the only problems I had was with the grips and grabbing cars and the monsters falling over without being hit. Most of it was okay and I can't wait for future updates(I have a few ideas for future updates you can add new characters we can play as with abilities or maybe change the graphics to seem more realistic)

reviews.review_title: But the one thing that needs fixing
reviews.review_description: It’s a fun game overall but the mechanics when you’re trying to punch them or grab them from the ground and bash them against the floor or the buildings it’s a bit hard for me to grab them and throw them because for me when I got the game I thought they would be like zero weight but then I realized when I picked it up it was really hard for my character to throw it so if the creator of this game could add some sort of like more strengths to the characters or to the character that you are in the game that would be really helpful other than that I would write this game a five
